name: Elizabethtown Fitness Club
about: Elizabethtown Fitness Club is a multi-sport facility that features a dedicated indoor golf simulator alongside a full fitness center. The golf experience centers around a Foresight GC2 simulator, allowing users to play on over 25 world-class courses, including notable Pennsylvania layouts like Merion and Oakmont. The venue operates with a mixed-use model, offering golf by the hour to both members and non-members, while also providing a range of fitness memberships and group fitness classes. The facility is a community-oriented space emphasizing a welcoming environment for all ages and fitness levels, making it suitable for both serious golf practice and casual play.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to high-quality Foresight GC2 simulator technology
Wide selection of over 25 golf courses, including exclusive Pennsylvania layouts
Affordable pricing options for both members and non-members
Partnership with York Indoor Golf & Training Center for expert-level instruction

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service is mentioned in the provided content.
No on-site alcohol service is mentioned in the provided content.

simulator_hardware.notes: A high-end simulator featuring a dual camera launch monitor system.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator. The venue does not mention club rentals as a service.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The provided content does not mention any food or beverage service, nor does it specify a policy on outside food or drinks. It is recommended to call the venue directly at 717.367.3327 for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify an estimated time for an 18-hole round. However, it offers an '18 Holes' option for $20 (members) or $25 (non-members).

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Elizabethtown Fitness Club appears to be kid-friendly. The venue offers a Zumba Gold class specifically designed for seniors or those with lower fitness levels, indicating an inclusive environment for various age groups.
